+        # Load the test data

+        csv_path = os.path.join(data_path, 'test.csv')

+        pt_path = os.path.join(data_path, 'test_3d.pt')

+        

+        # Read the CSV file to get the order of molecules

+        df = pd.read_csv(csv_path)

+        self.smiles_list = df['smiles'].tolist()

+        

+        # Load the 3D data

+        self.test_data = torch.load(pt_path)

+        

+        # Verify that the order matches

+        assert len(self.smiles_list) == len(self.test_data), \

+            f"Mismatch between CSV ({len(self.smiles_list)}) and PT ({len(self.test_data)}) lengths"

+        

+        for i in range(len(self.smiles_list)):

+            assert self.smiles_list[i] == self.test_data[i]['smiles'], \

+                f"Mismatch at index {i}: CSV has {self.smiles_list[i]}, PT has {self.test_data[i]['smiles']}"
